title: Veloxy's Optimisations
body:
Want better performace out of Vanilla Minecraft? This is the ModPack for you!

 

Performance

Ths Modpack utilises 'performace' mods such as Sodium, Lithium and others to massively improve the performance of the game to create a more enjoyable gaming experince!

 

This modpack is made to have a 'familliar feel' meaning that everything is as original as can be, just regular minecraft with improved performance! - Who doesn't Love that?

 

Want to add other mods to change your game experience? - Well it's as simple as can be, This modpack is designed for perfomance boosting meaning you can play however you wish with the added performance boost!

 

List of Included Mods - Can add more if suggested!

BadOptimizations
Cloth API
Cloth Config API
Concurrent CHunk Management Engine
Entity Culling
Fabric APi
Fabric Language Kotlin
FerritCore
ImmediatelyFast
Iris Shaders
Konkrete
Lithium
MCEF
Melody
Mod Menu
ModernFix
MoreCulling
Mouse Tweaks
No Chat Reports
Noisium
ScalableLux
Sodium
Text Placeholder API
Very Many Players
YetAnotherConfigLib
Zoomify

Any Feedback/Improvements are Appreciated and will be taken on board!
